function.name: get_historical_weather
function.description: Get historical weather for a city on a specific date.
function.long_description: Retrieves historical daily weather summary including min/max/average temperature, precipitation, and weather code for a specified city and date using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get historical weather for

example_user_queries: Show historical weather for London on 2025-01-10
Get New York weather data for 2024-12-25
What was the weather in Chennai on 2025-06-01?
Give me yesterday's weather in Berlin
